raw.official description: Regenerative Burst now provides Baptiste with 20% increased attack speed for 3 seconds.
raw.ability details:
*Damage per second: 153 while firing (130.8 overall w/reload)
*Healing per second: 79.99 - 119.99 (indirect - direct) while firing (68.51 - 102.77 overall w/reload)

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.official description: Using any ability triggers Baptiste's Shoulder Turret, periodically firing up to 3 shots at allies, each restoring 40 health.
raw.ability details: * Shots target the allied hero with lowest health. * Targets must be within a ~105 degree view angle horizontally and ~70 degrees vertically. * First shot has a 0.7 second delay. * Activating a second ability while the Shoulder Turret is firing resets the ammo to 3 without overfill. * [[File:Baptiste-ability5.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Exo Boots|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Exo Boots|Exo Boots]] and No results do not trigger Automated Healing.

raw.official description: Hitting an entire three-round burst reloads a healing projectile. Healing projectile direct hits reloads 3 primary fire ammo.
Immortality Field restores 80 health to nearby allies and 40 health to Baptiste when destroyed.

raw.official description: Activate to heal yourself and nearby allies instantly, with additional healing over time. Instant heal is doubled for targets less than half health.
raw.heal:
50 (instant, >50% max HP)
100 (instant, <50% max HP)
50 over 4 seconds (HoT)
raw.ability details:
* Healing per second = 12.5
* The heal-over-time effect is applied once upon activation. Allies can get out of range and continue to get healed.
* Although the ability has a casting animation, the healing over time is applied instantly, but begins healing after a delay, which means it cannot be interrupted by stuns, hacks or death.

abilities.name: Immortality Field
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect (field)

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect (field)
raw.official description: Toss a device that prevents allies from dying. The device can be destroyed.
raw.cast time: 0.8 second cast animation
raw.ability keywords: area of effect;;cylindrical::deployable;;strong projectile::ignore barrier;;target ally
raw.ability details: * Prevents the [[HP]] of Baptiste and his allies from going below 20%. It even prevents environmental death, but healing the HP lost this way will not give [[Ultimate ability|ultimate charge]]. * Heroes below the minimum HP threshold will instantly be healed to the threshold when entering the field. [[File:Ability-ana3.png|sub|link=Ana#Biotic Grenade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Biotic Grenade|Biotic Grenade]] can amplify or block this; if the healing is blocked, Immortality Field will still prevent all incoming damage. * The device can be thrown and bounced off walls. The arc is identical to that of Biotic Launcher's alternate fire, except Immortality Field collides with the skybox. * Both the thrown device and the field ignore [[barrier]]s but can be blocked by terrain and terrain-like [[objects]]. * [[Sombra]] can [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]] the device instantly destroying Immortality Field. * Placing a [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]] on the device destroys it. * The device can be placed on and lifted by [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] if the latter was deployed first. * When the device expires, the field will linger for 0.5 seconds. If the generator is destroyed, the field will still linger, but not as long. * Although the ability has a casting animation, the device is spawned the moment the button is pressed, and therefore cannot be cancelled mid-cast by a stun or hack. * Projectile bounces off of breakables and cannot deploy even on ones with a walkable top surface.

raw.ability details:
* Takes 0.7 seconds for the boots to fully charge.
* Baptiste must be standing on walkable surface to charge Exo-Boots.
* Charging stops if crouch is released or Baptiste becomes airborne, and the boots will remain charged for 1 second. The charge will reset if Baptiste starts charging the boots again during this time.

raw.official description: While airborne from Exo Boots, use (SPACE) to dash horizontally.
raw.ability details: * Cannot be used if airborne through any other means than Exo Boots.

raw.fire rate: 1.7 shots/s

raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: ~127.5 while firing (109 overall w/reload)
* Baptiste's crosshair moves up as he fires, then comes back down after firing.
* Reloading Biotic Launcher replenishes the ammo for both the primary and alternate fire.
* Baptiste can alternate between the two modes of fire.
** There is a 0.144 seconds recovery to use secondary fire after firing the third bullet.

raw.official description: Lob a healing projectile that heals all allies near the impact.
raw.fire rate: 1.11 shots/s
raw.reload time: 1.5 seconds animation
raw.ability details: * Healing per second: 66.66 - 99.99 (indirect - direct) while firing (57.09-85.64 overall w/reload) * Cannot heal self. * Projectile passes through full-health allies. * Reloading Biotic Launcher replenishes the ammo for both the primary and alternate fire. * Baptiste can alternate between the two modes of fire. ** There is a 0.144 seconds recovery to use primary fire after firing. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the explosion is unaffected. * No results affects all healing dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash healing alone going through is not amplified. * Projectile does not collide with fences and other breakables.

abilities.name: Amplification Matrix
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Project a matrix that doubles the damage and healing of allied projectiles.
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: ~258.2 while firing (Biotic Launcher) * Healing per second: 133.2 - 199.8 (indirect - direct) while firing (Biotic Launcher) * Before being deployed, the orientation can be changed by pressing the ultimate key again. * [[Damage amplification|Amplifies]] hitscan and projectile attacks alike, coming from any direction. ** This includes [[abilities]] that travel as a projectile but deal damage/healing in an AoE or as a DoT/HoT, such as [[File:Ability-mei4.png|sub|link=Mei#Blizzard|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Blizzard|Blizzard]], [[File:Ability-ashe2.png|sub|link=Ashe#Dynamite|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#Dynamite|Dynamite]] and [[File:Ability Moira Biotic Orb.png|sub|link=Moira#Biotic Orb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Biotic Orb|Biotic Orb]] (note that it does not change the total damage/healing for Biotic Orb, just the rate of damage/healing), as long as (and only if) the projectile passes through. ** This does ''not'' include Brigitte's Repair Pack and Zenyatta's Orb of Harmony/Discord. * You can tell if your projectile has been successfully amplified, as there is an associated sound effect and visual effect. * Cannot amplify the damage of melee-based projectiles such as [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]], [[File:Whip Shot.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Whip Shot|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Whip Shot|Whip Shot]] or [[File:Ability Binding Chain.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Binding Chain|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Binding Chain|Binding Chain]]. * Amplification Matrix does not actually double final damage/healing, but increases base damage dealt by an additional 100%. When combined with other amplification abilities, they are added together. For example, Amplification Matrix (+100%) and [[Mercy]]'s Damage Boost (+25%) will result in +125% damage (225% damage overall). * If Amplification Matrix is placed on a temporary surface, such as [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]], it will remain suspended in midair after the surface disappears. Conversely, if it is placed on a moving surface, such as the [[payload]], it will move with that surface. * Can be destroyed by [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]]. * Destroys fences and other breakables that collide with it.
